creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Fri, Sep 08, 2000 at 12:48:35PM +0300, Peter Pentchev wrote:
> On Thu, Sep 07, 2000 at 07:17:57PM -0700, Bill Fenner wrote:
> > 
> > Won't just changing the ports to use MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=non-gnu/.* be easier?

Yes, MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR actually works.  Alright, this PR may be closed,
I'll see which of the GNU-hosted ports need to refer to a non-gnu/ subdir,
and get in touch with their respective maintainers.

Thanks again for the hint!

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
I am not the subject of this sentence.
